description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, anatomically inspired design with a smooth, light gray exterior and visible joint segments at the shoulders, elbows, hips, knees, and ankles. The torso is broad and muscular, with defined chest and back contours, and the limbs are proportionate and robust, suggesting strength and stability. The head is rounded and featureless, lacking any visible facial components or sensors, giving it a neutral, expressionless appearance. The hands are articulated with individual fingers, and the feet are flat and wide for balance. Subtle panel lines and joint mechanisms are visible at the major articulation points, indicating a high degree of mobility. The overall finish is glossy and hard, resembling high-grade polymer or composite materials, with some darker accents at the joints and neck.
description: A sleek, muscular humanoid robot with a smooth, glossy light gray exterior, articulated joints, and a featureless head.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the broad back, defined shoulder blades, and articulated joints at the elbows, hips, and knees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, chest, and limb articulation, with visible joint mechanisms at the elbows and knees.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the muscular chest, featureless face, articulated arms and hands, and symmetrical leg positioning.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the head, torso, and limb joints.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs straight, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated, smooth panels with no visible clothing or decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face is completely featureless, with no eyes, mouth, nose, or expressive elements; the head is smooth and rounded.
attribute_limb_articulation: Visible articulation at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; joints appear to be ball or rotary types, allowing a wide range of motion; fingers are individually articulated.
